name: testSortEntries
description: Verify that entries can be sorted by Priority, Status, Acquirer and Currencies in Asc and Desc order
descriptionHtml: Verify that entries can be sorted by Priority, Status, Acquirer and Currencies in Asc and Desc order

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0713.114823.23.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Verify that entries can be sorted by Priority, Status, Acquirer and Currencies in Asc and Desc order

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Gateway' tab
Select '0713.114823 company 112172' company using filter
Select 'Merchant 1 for C112172' business unit using filter
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway' in dropdown
Close alert message
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway EUR' acquirer using filter
Type '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway EUR' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway EUR' in dropdown
Close alert message
Click 'Add merchant acquirer button'
Select '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway GBP' acquirer using filter
Type '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway GBP' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0713.114823 acquirer for gateway GBP' in dropdown
Close alert message
Click 'Status' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Status in Desc order
Click 'Status' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Status in Asc order
Click 'Priority' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Priority in Asc order
Click 'Priority' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Priority in Desc order
Click 'Acquirer' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Acquirer in Asc order
Click 'Acquirer' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Acquirer in Desc order
Click 'Currencies' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Currencies in Asc order
Click 'Currencies' column header
Verify that entries are sorted by Currencies in Desc order
